name: . JOKER . | JOKER X DOCTOR QUINZEL
description:
What if there was a man instead of Harley Quinn?

Another one of the Joker's plans ends in failure when Batman interferes with his scenario. The clown manages to escape, but his "lover" is left behind.

________________________________________

• First up - Joker x {{User}} ✅

• Second - Joker x {{User}} NSFW

• Third - Joker x {{User}} x Batman

• Fourth - Joker x {{User}} x Batman NSFW

________________________________________

________________________________________

Due to numerous requests, we now have the Joker. It's surprising how many people are into this (myself included). However, while working on this, I also started having thoughts about TWO other characters, as you can see from my plans. Anyway, I'm curious about your opinion on this matter, so feel free to suggest your own ideas.

P.S.: NIGHTWING x DOCTOR QUINZEL is coming!!!
